name: write-file
description: Write or append content to a file atomically, creating parent directories as needed.

parameters.name: filepath
parameters.description: Path to the file to write

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: Content to write (omit or use - to read from stdin)
Read content from stdin instead of argument

parameters.name: --append
parameters.description: Append to file instead of overwriting

cost_saving_rationale: Replaces multi-line heredoc (cat > file << 'EOF') or echo+redirect chains with one step, saving tool call characters and step count.
